---
title: "Deep Visual Proteomics maps proteotoxicity in a genetic liver disease"
author: 
- Rosenberger
- Mädler
- Thorhauge
- et al.
publication: "Nature, **642**, 484–491 (2025)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - artificial-intelligence
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-025-08885-4
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nature"
issue: 642
page: 484–491
year: 2025
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s41586-025-08885-4
---
